subcodes.first_line: O scion of the Friend! Today is the day of purity and freedom, and the time to act upon the counsels of the divine Prophets, to the utmost of thy power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل خلیل امروز روز پاکی و آزادگیست و وقت عمل بوصایای انبیای الهی تا توانی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity
